name: Nexam Chemical Holding AB (publ)
summary: Nexam Chemical Holding AB (publ) develops solutions that enhance properties and performance of various types of polymers in Sweden. It offers various products that enhance the properties and durability of polyesters, polyethylene, polyamides, polyimides, and high temperature resins, as well as produces functional substances, multifunctional masterbatches, additive masterbatches and compounds, color masterbatches and compounds, and recycling performance masterbatches under the NEXAMITE and NEXIMID names. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Lomma, Sweden.
